name: Trophy Truck Racing Tour
short_description: Can you become the best driver on the Trophy Truck Racing Tour?  Battle against other drivers at several different off-road dirt tracks and experience what it's like to drive one of the most intense off-road trucks ever built.
detailed_description:
Can you become the best driver on the Trophy Truck Racing Tour?  Battle against other drivers at several different off-road dirt tracks and experience what it's like to drive one of the most intense off-road trucks ever built.  Master each track and post the best lap time to secure your reputation as one of the best drivers!

Trophy Truck Racing Tour:

Take to the track against a full field of drivers and battle for every position in every corner.  Slide around and try different racing lines to move forward through the field of trucks.  

Someone holding you up?  No problem, because these heavy-built trophy trucks can handle a few bumps and scrapes.  Knock your opponents out of the way and test your abilities behind the wheel as you master various off-road tracks.

Online Trials:

Battle against the clock and post the best lap time while competing on the Steam Leaderboards.  Every tenth of a second could make a difference as you try to secure your reputation as one of the best drivers.

Customization:

Customize your Trophy Truck Racing Experience by choosing your number and livery.  Customize the length of your racing sessions and choose from several intense off-road dirt tracks that will test your abilities.

Steam Integration:

  • Steam Leaderboards

  • Steam Achievements

Additional Information:

Controllers and Gamepads are supported for driving controls.
